btns.declinedDesc: Are you sure you want to cancel the loan issuance?

credit-calculator.title: Let’s calculate your comfortable loan conditions
credit-calculator.description: This is a preliminary calculation and does not take the refinancing amount into account. If there are loans for refinancing, the proposed terms may change.
credit-calculator.insuranceConnectDesc: Reduces the interest rate and lowers the monthly payment
credit-calculator.notice: By confirming, you create a loan application. You will receive a one-time code to verify your phone number.

passportCheck.title: Passport is not valid
passportCheck.description: It is necessary to rescan the passport

passportCamera.title: Take a photo of your KR ID passport to verify your identity
passportCamera.description: Make sure the information is clearly readable

otp.title: Enter the confirmation code
otp.desc: A confirmation code has been sent to your mobile number {{phoneNumber}}

loanConditions.title: Your application has been approved under the following conditions
loanConditions.itemTitle: No visit to the bank required, we will send the money to your card

loanConfirmations.title: Your application has been approved
loanConfirmations.desc: Terms may have changed. Please check the details

coolingPeriod.title: Attention!
coolingPeriod.desc: For your convenience and safety, a “cooling-off period” is provided when applying for an online loan. During this time, the loan funds are not credited to your account immediately. This allows you to cancel the loan if necessary
coolingPeriod.periodTitle: The “cooling-off period” depends on the loan amount:
coolingPeriod.periodSecondOption: above 100,001 KGS — 12 hours, and a verification call to 5353 is required

securityWarning.title: MBANK cares about your safety!
securityWarning.desc: Fraudsters may pretend to be bank employees or law enforcement officers, call you, and use deception by claiming that you have allegedly approved an online loan and that some confirmation is required from you. They may ask you to start a video call and share your screen to gain access to your data
securityWarning.sectionTitle: If fraudsters call you, what should you do?
securityWarning.sectionFirstOption: Stay alert and do not panic

securityRemember.title: Remember
securityRemember.sectionFirstOption: Never take a loan under the influence of third parties
securityRemember.sectionThirdOption: Do not transfer money to unknown accounts
securityRemember.sectionFourthOption: Check all information before making a decision
securityRemember.sectionFifthOption: We are always available to help you!
securityRemember.desc: Follow these simple rules and protect your finances from fraud!

onlineLoanIssued.title: Loan has been issued
onlineLoanIssued.desc: Please wait for the funds to arrive after the cooling-off period

offlineLoanIssued.title: Loan has been issued
offlineLoanIssued.desc: Please wait. A bank specialist will contact you and invite you to the branch to receive the loan

cooling.title: Cooling-off period
cooling.desc: The loan funds will be credited to your main Mbank account after the cooling-off period. These measures are designed to protect you from fraudulent activities

declined.title: Confirm action
declined.desc: Are you sure you want to cancel the loan issuance?
